summary: Tested Dukkank backend (FastAPI) and frontend (React) end-to-end. Backend: 18/18 pytest cases pass after fixing a 500 ObjectId leak in POST /api/admin/games. Frontend: homepage renders with Arabic RTL by default, language toggle switches to English/LTR and back correctly, 22+ game cards rendered from API, admin login rejects wrong creds and redirects to /admin on success, dashboard shows all 4 tabs with populated Store settings, Games list with edit/delete, and a working new-game editor modal.

minor.issue: Was returning 500 because dict passed to motor.insert_one gets mutated with non-serializable ObjectId _id and was returned as-is. Fixed in /app/backend/server.py by adding doc.pop('_id', None) before return.

action_items: Add data-testid attributes to admin UI elements (login inputs/submit, admin-tab-*, edit/delete icon buttons, new-game-button, store form inputs) to make future automated testing reliable. Currently the admin uses icon-only buttons which forced visual verification.
Consider strengthening JWT_SECRET handling in production (current value in backend/.env is a static dev secret).
ESLint warnings about useMemo deps on SUBSCRIPTIONS/GAMES are non-blocking but worth cleaning up.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG (fixed): create_game returned a dict that motor had injected `_id` into → 500. Pattern of `data = payload.model_dump(); await db.x.insert_one(data); return data` is unsafe with motor. Other create_* endpoints (subscriptions, bundles) avoided this by calling model_dump() twice, but should be made consistent (use the same defensive pop('_id', None)).

Auth: bcrypt hash + JWT HS256 with seed_admin idempotent password update is implemented correctly. /auth/me works, admin guard correctly returns 401 without/with bad token, and password_hash & _id are stripped from responses.
Public endpoints correctly exclude `_id` via projection or strip_id helper.
CORS: allow_credentials=False with wildcard origins is consistent with the Bearer-in-localStorage approach used by frontend.
Frontend correctly uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL (no hardcoded URLs found in test flows).

success_rate.frontend: 100% on tested flows (homepage load, lang toggle, admin login wrong/correct, dashboard tabs, store populated, games list, new-game editor open)

seed_data_creation: None created beyond what the test cases create+delete (TEST_ prefixed games/bundles - all cleaned up automatically)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers full auth + public + admin CRUD; run with: cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. Admin UI uses icon-only edit/delete buttons (Lucide icons) and lacks data-testid attributes on most controls except [data-testid='lang-toggle'] on the public Header. If you need to assert admin edits via Playwright, prefer selectors like 'button:has-text("لعبة جديدة")' or wait for main agent to add data-testids.
